Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events. en Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only Story API Shim 1.2.24 Sat, 30 May 2026 13:05:22 -0400 https://media.npr.org/images/podcasts/primary/npr_generic_image_300.jpg?s=200 NPR Topics: News https://www.npr.org/sections/news/ Pride celebrations struggle as corporate sponsorships dry up <em>Public support for the LGBTQ+ community by corporations has become politically risky, public relations expert says.</em> Sat, 30 May 2026 09:00:00 -0400 https://www.npr.org/2026/05/30/nx-s1-5805854/pride-parade-struggle-corporate-sponsorships https://www.npr.org/2026/05/30/nx-s1-5805854/pride-parade-struggle-corporate-sponsorships

Public support for the LGBTQ+ community by corporations has become politically risky, public relations expert says.

(Image credit: Hannah Frances Johansson)

]]> Hannah Frances Johansson Carcass of Timmy the humpback whale brought to shore in Denmark The humpback whale, nicknamed "Timmy" by German media, died following a controversial failed rescue effort. His carcass had been drifting near the Danish shore for two weeks. ]]> The Associated Press Opinion: Pope Leo reminds us of the value of our shared humanity Pope Leo's first encyclical voices his concerns about technology and AI. ]]> Scott Simon Hegseth urges Asian leaders to boost military spending against China The U.S. defense secretary said there is "rightful alarm" of China's military build up. But he also struck a more moderate tone on U.S.-China relations – and notably sidestepped bringing up Taiwan. Sat, 30 May 2026 07:42:06 -0400 https://www.npr.org/2026/05/30/nx-s1-5837615/hegseth-shangri-la-security-summit https://www.npr.org/2026/05/30/nx-s1-5837615/hegseth-shangri-la-security-summit

(Image credit: Anupam Nath)

]]> Jennifer Pak The NTSB tries to keep cockpit audio recordings private. ]]> Joel Rose Colombia's untapped wonder: The Mavecure Mountains Far from Colombia's tourist hubs, the Mavecure Mountains rise from the Amazon jungle. ]]> Danielle Kurtzleben Trump's name must come off of the Kennedy Center, judge rules The judge wrote in his 94-page ruling that it was "crystal clear" that the arts complex was named for the late president John F. Kennedy. He also ruled that the center could not wind down its programming and close for two years of renovations – at least for now Fri, 29 May 2026 16:33:21 -0400 https://www.npr.org/2026/05/29/nx-s1-5839349/president-trump-kennedy-center-name-judge-order https://www.npr.org/2026/05/29/nx-s1-5839349/president-trump-kennedy-center-name-judge-order added to the Kennedy Center in December of 2025. This photo was taken in April 2026.'/>

The judge wrote in his 94-page ruling that it was "crystal clear" that the arts complex was named for the late president John F. Kennedy. He also ruled that the center could not wind down its programming and close for two years of renovations – at least for now

(Image credit: Julia Demaree Nikhinson)
